name: zeta-ai-monorepo
description: ZETA AI Monorepo - Backend, Extension, Desktop App

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:apps/backend" "npm run dev:extension" "npm run dev:apps/desktop"
scripts.dev:apps/backend: cd apps/backend && poetry run uvicorn app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.build: npm run build:extension && npm run build:apps/desktop
scripts.test: npm run test:extension && npm run test:apps/desktop && npm run test:apps/backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:apps/backend && npm run lint:extension && npm run lint:apps/desktop
scripts.lint:apps/backend: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check app config && poetry run black --check app config
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd apps/backend && poetry install
scripts.clean: cd apps/backend && rm -rf dist .pytest_cache && cd ../../extension && rm -rf out node_modules && cd ../apps/desktop && rm -rf dist node_modules
scripts.lint:py: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check app config
scripts.format:check: prettier --check . && cd apps/backend && poetry run black --check .
scripts.imports:py:check: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check --select I app config
scripts.imports:py:fix: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check --select I app config --fix
scripts.imports:all: npm run imports:py:fix && npm run imports:ts:fix
scripts.fix:py: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check app config --fix && poetry run black app config
scripts.fix:all: npm run fix:py && npm run fix:ts
scripts.check:py: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check app config && poetry run black --check app config && poetry run mypy app config
scripts.check:all: npm run check:py && npm run check:ts
scripts.qa:py:prepare: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check --select I,UP app config --fix --exit-zero && poetry run black app config
scripts.qa:py:check: cd apps/backend && poetry run ruff check --ignore UP006,UP007,UP035,UP038 app config && poetry run black --check app config
scripts.qa:py:full: npm run qa:py:prepare && npm run qa:py:check && npm run qa:py:test
scripts.workspace:health: npm run lint && npm run type-check && npm run test
scripts.ai:full-check: npm run ai:analyze && npm run ai:verify
scripts.test:all: npm run test:ai-intelligence && npm run test:ai-codemod && npm run test:apps/backend && npm run test:extension
